features.description: Login with email and password
steps: Open app and see the login screen with email and password fields
Enter a valid operator email address
Enter a valid password
Tap 'Login' button
Verify a loading indicator appears during authentication
Verify successful login redirects to the Operator Dashboard
Verify JWT token is stored securely on-device (e.g., flutter_secure_storage)

features.description: Login with invalid credentials shows error
steps: Open app login screen
Enter an invalid email or password
Tap 'Login' button
Verify an inline error message is displayed below the form (not a native OS alert)
Verify the password field is cleared but the email field retains its value

features.description: Role-based access restricts navigation to operator-relevant modules only
steps: Login as an operator (role: OPERADOR)
Verify the bottom navigation or side menu only shows: Dashboard, Daily Reports, Fuel Vouchers, Checklists, Approvals
Verify administrative modules (Contracts, Valorizations, Provider Management) are NOT visible
Login as a supervisor (role: SUPERVISOR)
Verify additional modules like Daily Report Reception and Equipment Inspection Tracking are visible

features.description: Session persistence across app restarts
steps: Login successfully
Force-close the app completely
Reopen the app
Verify the user is still logged in and redirected to the Dashboard (JWT not expired)
Verify if JWT is expired, the user is redirected to the login screen

features.description: Logout clears session and navigates to login
steps: Navigate to user profile or settings
Tap 'Logout' button
Verify a confirmation dialog appears asking 'Are you sure you want to logout?'
Confirm logout
Verify the user is redirected to the login screen
Verify the stored JWT token is cleared from secure storage

features.description: Operator Dashboard shows summary of today's tasks and pending items
steps: Login as an operator and land on the Dashboard
Verify Dashboard shows: assigned equipment with its code and description
Verify Dashboard shows: today's Daily Report status (Submitted / Not Submitted)
Verify Dashboard shows: pending checklist count (due today or overdue)
Verify Dashboard shows: pending approval requests count from 'Recibidos' tab
Verify Dashboard shows: notification badge for unread items
Tap on the 'Daily Report' card to navigate directly to the New Daily Report form

features.description: Create a new Daily Equipment Report (Parte Diario) with all required fields
steps: Navigate to 'New Daily Report' from Dashboard or Daily Reports list
Verify the form pre-fills today's date (editable)
Select assigned equipment from a dropdown (populated from API with equipment code and description)
Enter 'Horometro Inicio' (start hour meter reading) as a numeric field
Enter 'Horometro Fin' (end hour meter reading) as a numeric field
Verify validation: end reading must be greater than or equal to start reading
Enter 'Odometro Inicio' (start odometer, if applicable) as a numeric field
Enter 'Odometro Fin' (end odometer, if applicable) as a numeric field
Verify validation: end odometer must be greater than or equal to start odometer
Enter 'Horas Efectivas' (effective hours worked) as a numeric field
Select the work activity from a categorized list or enter free text description
Add multiple work activities if needed (dynamic list with add/remove)
Optionally attach a Fuel Voucher reference (link to existing voucher or create new)
Add optional observations or notes in a multiline text field
Verify all mandatory fields show validation errors if left empty upon submission attempt

features.description: Daily Report captures standby, delays, and inoperability events
steps: Open a Daily Report form
Tap 'Add Event' to record a standby period
Select event type from dropdown: Stand By (Sunday), Stand By (No work front), Stand By (Holiday), Inoperability, Weather Stoppage, Maintenance
Enter start time and end time for the event
Verify the system auto-calculates the duration in hours
Add a reason/description for the event
Verify multiple events can be added to a single daily report
Verify events appear in a scrollable list within the form

features.description: Daily Report supports photo attachments
steps: Open a Daily Report form
Tap 'Attach Photo' button
Verify option to take a new photo using device camera
Verify option to select from device gallery
Take or select a photo
Verify photo thumbnail preview appears in the form
Verify multiple photos can be attached (up to a configurable limit, e.g., 5)
Tap on a photo thumbnail to view it full-screen
Verify a delete/remove option is available for each attached photo

features.description: Daily Report digital signature before submission
steps: Complete all required fields in the Daily Report form
Tap 'Sign & Submit' button
Verify a signature pad canvas appears
Draw a signature on the canvas using finger/stylus
Verify 'Clear' button resets the signature canvas
Tap 'Confirm Signature' to finalize
Verify the signature is captured and displayed as an image preview

features.description: Submit Daily Report and verify it triggers the approval workflow
steps: Complete and sign a Daily Report
Tap 'Submit' button
Verify a loading indicator appears during submission
Verify submission API call is made with all form data, events, photos, and signature
Verify a success confirmation dialog/snackbar appears
Verify the report status changes to 'Pending Approval'
Navigate to 'Enviados' (Sent) tab in Approvals Hub
Verify the submitted report appears with status 'Pending at Step 1'
Navigate to the Daily Reports history list
Verify the report appears in the list with its date, equipment, status, and summary

features.description: View Daily Report history with filtering and search
steps: Navigate to 'Daily Reports' list
Verify reports are listed in reverse chronological order (newest first)
Verify each list item shows: date, equipment code, status badge (Draft, Pending, Approved, Rejected)
Filter reports by date range using date picker
Filter reports by equipment using dropdown
Filter reports by status (All, Pending, Approved, Rejected)
Tap on a report to view its full details in read-only mode
Verify read-only view shows all fields, events, photos, and signature

features.description: Edit a Draft Daily Report before submission
steps: Navigate to Daily Reports list
Tap on a report with 'Draft' status
Verify the form opens in edit mode with pre-filled data
Modify any field (e.g., add an event or change hours)
Save as draft again or submit
Verify changes are persisted

features.description: Daily Report validation enforces submission within 1 day (CORP-GEM-P-001 rule)
steps: Attempt to create a Daily Report for a date older than 1 day ago
Verify a warning message appears: 'Daily reports must be submitted within 1 day of registration'
Verify the user can still submit but the warning is logged

features.description: Create a new Fuel Voucher (Vale de Combustible)
steps: Navigate to 'Fuel Vouchers' module from navigation
Tap 'New Voucher' button
Enter voucher number (text/numeric field)
Select fuel type from dropdown (Diesel, Gasolina, etc.)
Enter fuel quantity in gallons (numeric field with decimal support)
Enter unit price (optional, numeric field)
Select the equipment that received the fuel from a dropdown
Take a photo of the physical voucher using the device camera
Verify photo preview is shown in the form
Add optional notes/observations
Tap 'Save' button
Verify success confirmation appears
Verify the voucher appears in the Fuel Vouchers list

features.description: Fuel Voucher can be linked to a Daily Report
steps: Create a Fuel Voucher and save it
Open the Daily Report form
In the 'Fuel Voucher' section, tap 'Link Voucher'
Verify a list of unlinked vouchers for the selected equipment appears
Select the previously created voucher
Verify the voucher number and quantity appear in the Daily Report form
Submit the Daily Report
Verify the linked voucher is included in the submission payload

features.description: View Fuel Voucher history with list and detail view
steps: Navigate to 'Fuel Vouchers' list
Verify vouchers are listed with: date, voucher number, equipment, quantity, and linked report status
Filter vouchers by date range
Filter vouchers by equipment
Tap on a voucher to see full details including photo
Verify the photo can be zoomed in and viewed full-screen

features.description: Execute a Daily Pre-Use Checklist for light vehicles and minor equipment
steps: Navigate to 'Checklists' module
Tap 'New Checklist'
Select equipment from dropdown
Verify the checklist type is auto-determined based on equipment category: Daily for minor equipment and light vehicles
Verify the checklist template is loaded from the API with categorized inspection items
Go through each inspection item and mark as Pass or Fail
For failed items, verify a mandatory comment field appears
For failed items, verify an optional photo attachment button appears
Take a photo of the defective item if applicable
Complete all items in the checklist
Tap 'Submit Checklist'
Verify success confirmation appears
Verify failed items trigger a notification to the Maintenance/SSOMA team via API

features.description: Execute a Weekly Pre-Use Checklist for heavy equipment and heavy vehicles (Monday morning)
steps: Navigate to 'Checklists' module on a Monday
Tap 'New Checklist'
Select heavy equipment or heavy vehicle from dropdown
Verify the checklist type is auto-determined: Weekly for heavy equipment
Verify the system suggests or enforces that weekly checklists are due on Mondays
Complete all inspection items with Pass/Fail marks
Submit the checklist
Verify the checklist is saved with the correct weekly frequency tag

features.description: View Checklist history and overdue status
steps: Navigate to 'Checklists' list
Verify checklists are listed with: date, equipment, type (Daily/Weekly), pass/fail summary, status
Verify overdue checklists are highlighted with a visual indicator (e.g., accent-500 badge)
Filter checklists by equipment, date range, or status
Tap on a checklist to view its full details in read-only mode
Verify all items, comments, and photos are visible in the detail view

features.description: Report equipment inoperability incident directly from checklist or standalone
steps: From a checklist with failed critical items, tap 'Report Inoperability'
Alternatively, navigate to equipment detail and tap 'Report Incident'
Enter incident description (mandatory, multiline text)
Select severity level (Minor, Major, Critical) from dropdown
Take photos of the issue (at least 1 required for Major/Critical)
Enter estimated hours of inoperability (numeric field)
Submit the incident report
Verify the equipment status is updated to 'Inoperative' in the system
Verify a notification is sent to the Equipment Manager (Responsable de Equipo Mecanico)

features.description: View assigned equipment details and documentation status
steps: Navigate to 'My Equipment' section from Dashboard or navigation
Verify a list of assigned equipment appears with: code, type, brand, model
Tap on an equipment item to see its detail view
Verify detail view shows: full specifications (marca, modelo, serie, placa, ano, potencia neta)
Verify detail view shows: contract status (active/expired)
Verify detail view shows: document compliance status (SOAT, TREC insurance, technical inspection)
Verify detail view shows: upcoming document expirations with warning badges
Verify detail view shows: recent Daily Reports and Checklists for this equipment

features.description: Navigate Approvals Hub with Received and Sent tabs
steps: Navigate to 'Approvals' from the main navigation
Verify two tabs are visible: 'Recibidos' (Received) and 'Enviados' (Sent)
Tap 'Recibidos' tab
Verify a list of pending approval items is shown with: title, requester name, date, current step label
Verify items are sorted by most recent first
Verify a badge count on the tab shows the number of pending items
Tap 'Enviados' tab
Verify a list of user-initiated requests is shown with: title, date, status (Pending at Step X, Approved, Rejected)
Verify completed items show final status with approval/rejection date

features.description: Review and take action on a received approval request
steps: Open a pending item from the 'Recibidos' tab
Verify the detail view shows: title, description, attachments (tappable for preview), requester info
Verify the detail view shows: approval workflow steps with the current step highlighted
Verify the detail view shows: history of previous approvers' actions and comments
Type an optional comment in the comment field
Tap 'Approve' button
Verify a confirmation dialog appears: 'Are you sure you want to approve this request?'
Confirm the action
Verify success feedback and the item is removed from the 'Recibidos' list
Verify the workflow advances to the next step (visible if checking 'Enviados' as the requester)

features.description: Reject a received approval request with mandatory comment
steps: Open a pending item from the 'Recibidos' tab
Tap 'Reject' button
Verify a mandatory comment field appears (cannot reject without a reason)
Enter a rejection reason
Confirm the rejection
Verify the request status changes to 'Rejected' with the comment logged
Verify the requester sees the rejection and comment in their 'Enviados' tab

features.description: Create an Ad-Hoc (free-form) approval request
steps: Navigate to Approvals Hub
Tap 'New Request' / '+' FAB button
Select 'Ad-Hoc Request' type
Enter a title (mandatory, text field, max 100 chars)
Enter a description/body (mandatory, multiline text field)
Attach supporting documents: tap 'Attach' to take a photo or select a file (PDF, image)
Verify multiple attachments can be added (up to 5)
Tap 'Add Approvers' -- search and select users by name or role
Verify at least one approver is required
Optionally tap 'Add CC/Informed' -- search and select users
Review the request summary
Tap 'Submit' button
Verify the request appears in the 'Enviados' tab with status 'Pending at Step 1'

features.description: Module-integrated approval triggers automatically on Daily Report submission
steps: Submit a completed Daily Report
Verify the backend API instantiates the approval workflow based on the active template (e.g., Operator -> Supervisor -> Resident Engineer)
Verify the report status shows 'Pending Approval' in the Daily Reports list
Verify the report appears in the 'Enviados' tab of the Approvals Hub with the correct step progress
Login as the next approver in the chain (e.g., Supervisor)
Verify the report appears in their 'Recibidos' tab

features.description: Approval workflow supports fast-track routing (skip middle management)
steps: Configure a project's Daily Report template to skip the Supervisor step (Operator -> Resident Engineer directly)
Submit a Daily Report as an operator
Verify the request goes directly to the Resident Engineer (no Supervisor step)
Verify the Resident Engineer sees it in their 'Recibidos' tab
Approve the request as Resident Engineer
Verify the report status changes to 'Approved'

features.description: View approval workflow step history and immutable audit trail
steps: Open a completed (approved or rejected) request from 'Enviados' tab
Verify a step-by-step timeline is displayed showing: step number, approver name/role, action (Approved/Rejected), timestamp, comment
Verify the timeline is read-only and cannot be modified
Verify the template version (e.g., V1) is displayed for audit purposes

features.description: Offline mode: create and save Daily Reports without network connectivity
steps: Disable device network connection (airplane mode or turn off Wi-Fi/data)
Open the Daily Report form
Fill in all required fields, add events, take photos, and sign
Tap 'Save as Draft' or 'Submit'
Verify the report is saved locally with a 'Pending Sync' status badge
Verify a toast/snackbar message informs the user: 'Saved offline. Will sync when connected.'
Navigate to the Daily Reports list
Verify the offline report appears in the list with a 'Pending Sync' icon

features.description: Offline mode: create and save Checklists without network connectivity
steps: Disable device network connection
Open the Checklists module and create a new checklist
Complete all inspection items
Submit the checklist
Verify it is saved locally with 'Pending Sync' status
Verify photos are stored on-device until sync

features.description: Automatic sync when network connectivity is restored
steps: Create one or more offline records (Daily Reports, Checklists, Fuel Vouchers)
Re-enable device network connection
Verify the app automatically detects connectivity restoration
Verify a sync indicator appears (e.g., a sync icon in the app bar)
Verify all 'Pending Sync' records are uploaded to the backend API
Verify each record's status changes from 'Pending Sync' to 'Submitted' or 'Pending Approval'
Verify any sync failures show an error with retry option

features.description: Offline data conflict resolution
steps: Create an offline Daily Report for equipment X
Meanwhile, another user submits a Daily Report for equipment X on the same date via the web app
Restore connectivity and trigger sync
Verify the app detects the conflict
Verify the user is presented with conflict resolution options: overwrite remote, keep remote, or save as new draft

features.description: Push notifications for pending approvals and status changes
steps: Submit a Daily Report that triggers an approval workflow
Login as the approver on a different device
Verify a push notification is received: 'New approval request: Parte Diario [date] from [operator name]'
Tap the push notification
Verify the app opens directly to the approval detail view
Approve the request
Verify the original requester receives a push notification: 'Your Daily Report [date] has been approved by [approver name]'

features.description: In-app notification center with unread badge
steps: Verify notification bell icon is visible in the app bar
Verify an unread count badge appears when new notifications exist
Tap the notification bell to open the notification center
Verify notifications are listed with: icon, title, description, timestamp, and read/unread state
Tap a notification to navigate to the relevant screen
Verify the notification is marked as read after tapping

features.description: Supervisor: Receive and review Daily Reports from operators (Seguimiento y Control)
steps: Login as a supervisor
Navigate to 'Daily Report Reception' or 'Recibidos' in Approvals
Verify a list of incoming Daily Reports appears with: date, operator name, equipment, status
Tap on a report to review its full details
Verify all fields (hours, activities, events, fuel, photos, signature) are visible in read-only mode
Add a comment/observation if needed
Approve or reject the report from this view
Verify the tracking log (CORP-GEM-F-007) is updated

features.description: Supervisor: View equipment inspection tracking dashboard (CORP-GEM-F-008)
steps: Login as a supervisor or equipment manager
Navigate to 'Equipment Inspections' section
Verify a summary dashboard shows: total equipment count, inspected this period, overdue inspections, open observations
Tap on an equipment item to see its inspection history
Verify open observations from checklists and daily reports are listed
Verify each observation shows: date reported, description, photo (if any), resolution status
Mark an observation as 'Resolved' with a comment

features.description: View monthly Valorization summary (read-only for field users)
steps: Navigate to 'Valorizations' from the navigation (if role permits)
Verify a list of monthly valorization periods is shown
Tap on a period to see the valorization summary for assigned equipment
Verify the summary shows: total effective days/hours, minimum days/hours, days/hours to valorize, tariff, gross amount, deductions, net amount
Verify the deduction breakdown shows: fuel handling, parts/repairs, advances
Verify the data is read-only (no editing from mobile)

features.description: View equipment contract details (read-only)
steps: Navigate to equipment detail view
Tap 'Contract' tab or section
Verify contract details are displayed: contract number, start date, end date, tariff type (hourly/daily/monthly), tariff amount, modality (Seca Operada, Seca No Operada, etc.)
Verify Annex A information is shown: what the tariff includes (maintenance, operator, fuel, insurance, etc.)
Verify contract status badge: Active, Expired, Renewed
Verify the data is read-only (no editing from mobile)

features.description: Equipment document expiration warnings
steps: View equipment detail
Verify document compliance section shows: SOAT status, TREC insurance status, Technical Inspection Certificate status, Operator License status
Verify documents expiring within 30 days show a warning badge
Verify expired documents show an error badge
Verify tapping on a document row shows its expiration date and renewal instructions

features.description: Search across all modules from a global search bar
steps: Tap the search icon in the app bar
Type a query (e.g., equipment code, report date, voucher number)
Verify search results are grouped by category: Daily Reports, Fuel Vouchers, Checklists, Equipment, Approvals
Tap a result to navigate directly to the item's detail view
Verify recent searches are displayed when the search field is empty

features.description: Pull-to-refresh on all list screens
steps: Navigate to any list screen (Daily Reports, Fuel Vouchers, Checklists, Approvals)
Pull down on the list to trigger a refresh
Verify a refresh indicator appears
Verify the list data is re-fetched from the API
Verify newly added items from other devices appear after refresh

features.description: Paginated loading for long lists with infinite scroll
steps: Navigate to a list screen with more than 20 items (e.g., Daily Reports)
Verify the first page of results loads (e.g., 20 items)
Scroll to the bottom of the list
Verify a loading indicator appears at the bottom
Verify the next page of results loads and appends to the list
Continue scrolling until all items have been loaded
Verify a 'No more items' indicator appears at the end

features.description: Color palette strictly follows design-tokens.json gold standard
steps: Inspect the app's visual elements across all screens
Verify primary text color is #072b45 (primary-900)
Verify interactive elements (buttons, links, toggles) use #0077cd (primary-500)
Verify app background / scaffold background is #ebf3f8 (primary-100)
Verify card backgrounds use #f6f7f8 (grey-100) or white
Verify accent color #e37222 (accent-500) is used sparingly for highlights
Verify informative states (info badges, info alerts) use #006fc9 (semantic-blue-500)
Verify KLM Blue (#00a1de) is NOT used anywhere in the UI (branding only)

features.description: Typography follows Aero Design System hierarchy
steps: Verify headlines use a display-weight sans-serif font (or system equivalent of Universal Sans Display)
Verify body text uses a regular-weight sans-serif font (or system equivalent of Universal Sans)
Verify body text default size is 14px-16px depending on density
Verify heading hierarchy: H1 > H2 > H3 is visually distinct and consistent
Verify labels and captions use the designated smaller size (12px equivalent)

features.description: Spacing follows Aero spacing scale tokens
steps: Inspect padding and margins across multiple screens
Verify spacing values are multiples of 4px (consistent with the spacing scale: 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 40, 48, 56, 64, 72, 80)
Verify vertical gap between form fields is 24px
Verify horizontal gap between paired form fields (e.g., start/end dates) is 16px
Verify card internal padding is 16px or 24px
Verify list item vertical padding is 8px or 12px

features.description: Buttons follow Aero action hierarchy and styling
steps: Verify primary action buttons use filled style with primary-500 background and white text
Verify secondary action buttons use outlined style with primary-500 border and primary-500 text
Verify tertiary/text buttons have no border/background, only text in primary-500
Verify only one primary action button is visible per screen/view
Verify destructive actions use accent-500 styling
Verify button corner radius matches design system (radius-sm = 4px or radius-md = 8px)
Verify minimum touch target size is 48x48dp for all buttons

features.description: Form inputs match Aero input component styling
steps: Navigate to any form (Daily Report, Fuel Voucher, Checklist)
Verify text inputs have a visible border (grey-300) and label above the field
Verify focused inputs have a primary-500 border highlight
Verify error states show a visual indicator (accent border + error message below field)
Verify dropdown/select components match Aero dropdown aesthetics (not native OS picker)
Verify date pickers use a styled calendar component (not native OS date picker)
Verify all inputs have sufficient touch area (48dp height minimum)

features.description: Cards match Aero card component styling
steps: Navigate to the Dashboard and any list screen
Verify cards have white background with subtle elevation/shadow
Verify cards have consistent corner radius (radius-md = 8px)
Verify cards have consistent internal padding (16px or 24px)
Verify card titles follow the heading hierarchy
Verify action buttons within cards are aligned to the bottom or right

features.description: Status badges use consistent visual language
steps: Navigate to any list with status indicators (Daily Reports, Approvals, Checklists)
Verify 'Approved' / 'Pass' statuses use semantic-blue-100 background with semantic-blue-500 text
Verify 'Pending' statuses use grey-100 background with grey-700 text
Verify 'Rejected' / 'Fail' statuses use accent-500-related background with dark text
Verify 'Draft' statuses use grey-200 background with grey-900 text
Verify all badges have consistent padding, border-radius (radius-sm), and font size

features.description: Modals and dialogs follow Aero guidelines (no native OS alerts)
steps: Trigger any confirmation dialog (e.g., logout, submit, delete, approve, reject)
Verify the dialog is a custom Flutter widget matching Aero card styling
Verify native window.confirm / alert equivalents are NOT used
Verify the dialog has: title, description, and action buttons
Verify the primary action button is positioned at the bottom right
Verify the background overlay uses primary-900 at 90% opacity (--overlay-backdrop)

features.description: Forms follow single-column layout for mobile devices
steps: Open any form on a standard phone (360-412px width)
Verify all form fields are laid out in a single column
Verify no horizontal scrolling is required
Verify the submit/primary action button is full-width or prominently placed
Verify form sections are visually separated with section headers or dividers

features.description: Tablet layout adapts to larger screen real estate
steps: Open the app on an Android tablet (768-800px width)
Verify forms may use two-column layout for related field pairs where appropriate
Verify list views expand with more visible data per row
Verify the navigation adapts (e.g., permanent side nav instead of bottom nav on tablets)
Verify modals are not full-screen on tablets but centered with max-width
Verify content areas have appropriate max-width to prevent overly wide text lines

features.description: Responsive layout handles orientation changes (portrait and landscape)
steps: Open any screen on a phone in portrait mode
Rotate the device to landscape
Verify the UI adapts without content being cut off
Verify forms remain scrollable and usable in landscape
Verify the navigation adjusts appropriately
Rotate back to portrait and verify the UI reverts correctly

features.description: Navigation uses bottom navigation bar on phones
steps: Open the app on a phone
Verify a bottom navigation bar is present with icons and labels for: Dashboard, Reports, Vouchers, Checklists, Approvals
Verify the active tab is highlighted with primary-500 color
Verify inactive tabs use grey-700 color
Tap each tab and verify navigation to the correct screen
Verify the bottom nav remains visible on all main screens (hidden during full-screen forms if appropriate)

features.description: App bar with consistent header pattern
steps: Navigate through various screens
Verify the app bar shows the screen title in primary-900
Verify a back arrow appears on sub-screens (not on main dashboard tab screens)
Verify a notification bell icon is visible on the main screens
Verify a user avatar/initials icon is present for accessing profile/settings
Verify the app bar background is white or primary-100

features.description: Empty states provide helpful guidance and actions
steps: Navigate to a list screen with no data (e.g., new user with no Daily Reports)
Verify an empty state illustration or icon is displayed
Verify a descriptive message explains why the list is empty (e.g., 'No daily reports yet')
Verify a CTA button is available to create the first item (e.g., 'Create First Report')

features.description: Loading states provide visual feedback on all data-fetching operations
steps: Navigate to any screen that loads data from the API
Verify a shimmer/skeleton loading state appears while data is being fetched
Verify the shimmer placeholder matches the approximate layout of the expected content
Verify the loading state transitions smoothly to the loaded content
Verify no blank/white screen flashes during data loading

features.description: Error states show clear messages with retry options
steps: Simulate a network error (e.g., API down or timeout)
Verify an error message appears: 'Unable to load data. Please try again.'
Verify a 'Retry' button is visible
Tap 'Retry' and verify the request is re-attempted
Verify the error state uses the appropriate Aero notification styling

features.description: Mobile app is an isolated project within the monorepo
steps: Verify the Flutter app is created in a dedicated directory (e.g., /mobile)
Verify the mobile app has its own pubspec.yaml, lib/, test/ directories
Verify the mobile app only interacts with the backend via REST API calls
Verify no direct imports or dependencies on the Angular frontend code
Verify no modifications to the Node.js/NestJS backend are required to support the mobile app (uses existing API endpoints)
Verify the mobile app can be built and tested independently of the frontend/backend

features.description: Application primarily targets Android devices
steps: Verify the Flutter project has Android configured as the primary target platform
Verify compileSdkVersion and targetSdkVersion are set to modern Android API levels (34+)
Verify camera, storage, and network permissions are declared in AndroidManifest.xml
Verify the minSdkVersion supports the majority of field devices (API 23+ / Android 6.0+)
Verify iOS support is secondary but does not break the project structure

features.description: API layer uses a centralized HTTP client with auth headers and error handling
steps: Verify all API calls go through a centralized HTTP client/service
Verify the client automatically attaches the JWT Bearer token to all requests
Verify the client handles 401 Unauthorized responses by redirecting to login
Verify the client handles network timeouts with a user-facing error message
Verify all API base URLs are configurable via environment/build flavors (dev, staging, prod)

features.description: Local database for offline storage using SQLite or Hive
steps: Verify a local database (e.g., sqflite, drift, or Hive) is configured
Verify Daily Reports, Checklists, and Fuel Vouchers can be serialized to and from the local database
Verify the local database schema mirrors the API response structures
Verify a sync queue table tracks items pending upload
Verify the local database is initialized at app startup

features.description: Secure storage for sensitive data (JWT tokens, credentials)
steps: Verify flutter_secure_storage or equivalent is used for JWT token storage
Verify tokens are NOT stored in SharedPreferences or plain text files
Verify the app does not log sensitive data (tokens, passwords) to the console in production
Verify biometric authentication (fingerprint/face) can optionally be used to unlock the app

features.description: State management follows a predictable, testable pattern
steps: Verify a state management solution is in place (e.g., Riverpod, BLoC, or Provider)
Verify global app state (auth, user profile, selected project) is managed centrally
Verify feature-specific state (form data, list filters) is scoped to the feature
Verify state changes trigger UI rebuilds predictably
Verify state management logic is unit-testable

features.description: Multi-tenant support via project/empresa context
steps: Login as a user assigned to multiple projects
Verify a project selector is available (e.g., in the app bar or settings)
Switch between projects
Verify all data (equipment, reports, vouchers, checklists, approvals) is scoped to the selected project
Verify the API calls include the appropriate id_empresa and id_proyecto headers or params

features.description: Image compression before upload to reduce bandwidth usage in field conditions
steps: Take a high-resolution photo (e.g., 12MP camera)
Verify the app compresses the image before uploading (target max ~1MB or 1920px longest side)
Verify the compression does not make the image unusable for inspection purposes
Verify the original photo is not retained on-device after upload (to save storage)

features.description: App versioning and forced update mechanism
steps: Verify the app displays the current version number in Settings/About
Verify the app checks the API for the minimum supported version at startup
If the current version is below the minimum, verify a blocking dialog prompts the user to update
Verify the update dialog links to the Play Store (or internal APK distribution)

features.description: Daily Report detail view (read-only)
steps: Navigate to Daily Reports list
Tap on a report to open the detail view
Verify all fields are displayed in read-only mode: date, equipment, hours, activities, events
Verify photos and signature are visible
Verify status badge and approval history are shown

features.description: Fuel Voucher detail view with photo display
steps: Navigate to Fuel Vouchers list
Tap on a voucher to open the detail view
Verify all fields displayed: voucher number, equipment, fuel type, quantity, price
Verify photo of the voucher is displayed

features.description: Checklist history/detail view
steps: Navigate to Checklists list
Tap on a checklist to open the detail view
Verify all inspection items are displayed with pass/fail status
Verify failed items show comments and photos
Verify overall status and submission date are shown

features.description: Valorization detail with breakdown
steps: Navigate to Valorizations list
Tap on a valorization period
Verify summary totals are displayed: effective hours/days, tariff, gross amount
Verify deduction breakdown is visible

features.description: Page transition animations
steps: Navigate between screens using bottom nav and push routes
Verify smooth slide/fade transitions between pages
Verify no jarring instant transitions

features.description: Haptic feedback on key actions
steps: Submit a form (Daily Report, Checklist, Voucher)
Verify medium haptic feedback is triggered on successful submission
Verify haptic feedback on approval/rejection actions

features.description: Offline connectivity banner
steps: Disable network connectivity
Verify a dark banner appears at the top: 'Sin conexion - los cambios se guardan localmente'
Re-enable connectivity
Verify the banner disappears

features.description: Consistent shimmer loading states across all screens
steps: Navigate to any list screen while data is loading
Verify shimmer placeholders appear matching the expected content layout
Verify the shimmer animation is consistent across all list screens

features.description: Consistent error states with retry across all screens
steps: Simulate an API error on any list screen
Verify the ErrorStateWidget appears with message and retry button
Tap retry and verify the request is re-attempted

features.description: Discard changes confirmation on form back navigation
steps: Open any form (Daily Report, Checklist, Voucher, Incident)
Start filling in fields
Press the back button
Verify a confirmation dialog appears asking to discard changes
Cancel and verify you remain on the form
Confirm and verify you navigate back

features.description: Reusable shared widgets (StatusBadge, EmptyState, ErrorState, ShimmerLoading)
steps: Verify StatusBadge widget exists with consistent color mapping for all statuses
Verify EmptyStateWidget exists with icon, title, subtitle, and optional CTA button
Verify ErrorStateWidget exists with error message and retry callback
Verify ShimmerLoading widget exists for list loading placeholders
Verify all list screens use these shared widgets consistently

features.description: Real sync service with connectivity-driven queue processing
steps: Verify sync service processes pending items from all data types (reports, checklists, vouchers)
Verify sync triggers automatically when connectivity is restored
Verify pending count badge appears in bottom navigation
Verify sync errors are surfaced to the user via snackbar
